sigWerErrors.reason: 'artışı' (the increase) and 'artırmak' (to increase) are different grammatical forms but convey the same intent in this context (requesting a limit increase). The meaning of the sentence is preserved.
'yapmak' (to do/make) is omitted, but the verb 'artırmak' already carries the action meaning in this context. The overall intent and meaning of the sentence remain clear.
